title: SafetyCenterService clearAllSafetySourceDataForTests available in production builds
notes: clearAllSafetySourceDataForTests (lines 617-633) and setSafetyCenterConfigForTests (lines 635-652) only require MANAGE_SAFETY_CENTER (signature) but are NOT restricted to test builds. Available in production. Compromised system app can: (1) wipe all safety warnings, (2) replace safety center config to disable sources. TODO comment acknowledges concern. Also: setSafetySourceData silently ignores invalid packages instead of throwing.
